# Quercia2

> Quercia2 publishes MotionPrompt Studio, an offline system for building, checking and exporting controlled AI-video production prompts.

## Free tool

- [AI Video Prompt Preflight](prompt-checker.html): A free local checker for camera, motion, timing, framing, continuity and negative direction. Prompts are not uploaded.

## Guide

- [AI Video Prompt Anatomy](guides/ai-video-prompt-anatomy.html): A practical six-layer method for turning prompt prose into a testable production brief.

## Product

- [MotionPrompt Studio](index.html): Full product overview, compatibility, included files and license summary.
- [Purchase through Gumroad](https://quercia2.gumroad.com/l/MotionPromptStudio): Official product and checkout provider.

## Product facts

- Runs locally in a current desktop browser.
- Requires no account, API key, installation or prompt upload.
- Includes 18 editable presets, 15 targeted repair blocks, 60 blueprint prompts, 24 client-ready campaign briefs and an 8-page visual guide.
- Supports direction workflows for Kling, Veo, Runway, WAN, Seedance, Hailuo and other text-to-video or image-to-video models.
- Does not generate video and does not guarantee a specific model result.
